Default.name: Button
Default.value: menu="true" bordersize="1,1,1,1" bordercolor="#FFC4D1E1" borderround="2,2" textcolor="#FFFFFFFF" bkcolor="#FF349DE5" hotbkcolor="#FF34ACF0" pushedbkcolor="#FF1A69BB"

Default.name: Combo
Default.value: textpadding="5,0,19,0" itemtextpadding="3,0,0,0" itemvalign="vcenter" bkcolor="#FFFFFFFF" bordersize="1,1,1,1" bordercolor="#FF359EE8" itemhotbkcolor="#FF86CEF6" itemselectedbkcolor="#FF33ABEE" dropbox="bordersize="1,1,1,1" bkcolor="#FFEBF3F6" bordercolor="#FF339CE4"" normalimage="file='customwnd/image/cmb.png' source='63,0,83,20' corner='0,0,20,0'" hotimage="file='customwnd/image/cmb.png' source='21,0,41,20' corner='0,0,20,0'" pushedimage="file='customwnd/image/cmb.png' source='21,0,41,20' corner='0,0,20,0'"
